title: Chapter 48
text: WHAT’S NEXT? Thank you so much for reading God of Ruin ! If you liked it, please leave a review. Your support means the world to me. If you’re thirsty for more discussions with other readers of the series, you can join the Facebook group, Rina Kent’s Spoilers Room . Next up is the story of Nikolai Sokolov and Brandon King in the standalone MM book, God of Fury .
